posts.author: timmykho (Tim Kho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! I’m Tim from Mint Consulting Australia.

I help companies get the most out of monday.com. Having worked with multiple nonprofits and businesses across different kinds of industries, I realized that the best workflow are those that people actually liked using. From building your dream setup from scratch to fixing something that’s not working, I got you covered.I’d be happy to talk with you regarding your specific needs and talk about:

  • Building a project management workflow from start to end
  • Using monday CRM as a one-stop shop for both customer relationship management and project management
  • Connecting monday.com with your other applications for a seamlesss workflow integration
  • Finding fixes for broken workflows and streamlining messy workflows

Let’s make monday.com the last work platform you’ll ever try. First consultation is on us. Book a 30-minute session with me or shoot me an email at tim@mintconsulting.org.
